data.summary: The exploratory step is inconclusive due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or checks that confirm the existence of functionality related to priority levels (blocking vs non-blocking). The only related information is a summary of the use case, which does not demonstrate that the system can manage or validate priority levels as specified. Therefore, the requirement cannot be validated based on the current evidence.
gaps: No evidence of API endpoints or functionality for managing priority levels.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the requirement for priority levels.
